Give everything to Anahata ❤️
Força Barça!
Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractAiProvider
    The abstract base class for all AI model providers, now with model caching.
    AbstractAnahataIcon
    The foundational base class for all programmatically drawn icons in the Anahata ASI ecosystem.
    AbstractAsiContainer
    A hybrid static/instance class for managing global and application-specific configurations.
    AbstractAsiContainerPanel
    A base abstract class for panels that manage a collection of AI agi sessions.
    AbstractBrowser
    The abstract base toolkit for all web automation implementations.
    AbstractContextNode<T>
    The base class for all nodes in the hierarchical context tree.
    AbstractHandlePanel<H>
    A specialized metadata panel for the ResourceHandle layer.
    AbstractJarHandler
    Base class for JAR handlers providing common file system and manifest reading utilities.
    AbstractLineEdit
    Base class for all surgical line-based edits.
    AbstractMessage
    The abstract base class for all messages in a conversation, providing common metadata and functionality for the rich, hierarchical V2 domain model.
    AbstractMessagePanel<T>
    A base class for rendering AbstractMessage instances in a collapsible, diff-based UI component.
    AbstractModel
    The abstract base class for a specific AI model (e.g., "gemini-1.5-pro-latest").
    AbstractModelMessage<R>
    Represents a message originating from the AI model.
    AbstractPart
    The foundational component of an AbstractMessage, representing a discrete block of multimodal content.
    AbstractPartPanel<T>
    The abstract base class for rendering AbstractPart instances in a diff-based UI component.
    AbstractProjectContextProvider
    Common base class for context providers that are bound to a specific NetBeans project.
    AbstractResourceHandle
    Base implementation of ResourceHandle providing common owner management.
    AbstractResourceView
    Base implementation for resource views providing parent resource management.
    AbstractSwingAsiContainer
    A Swing-specific base class for Anahata ASI containers.
    AbstractTextResourceViewer
    Common base for high-fidelity text resource viewers with autonomous Edit/Save UI.
    AbstractTextResourceViewer.SaveAction
    Contract for handling the persistent write of the editor content.
    AbstractTextResourceWrite
    Base DTO for text file operations, providing common fields for path, historical content preservation, and optimistic locking.
    AbstractTextResourceWriteRenderer<T>
    Base class for rendering file write operations (full updates or surgical replacements) using the NetBeans native diff viewer decorated with agentic annotations.
    AbstractTextSegmentRenderer
    Abstract base class for rendering individual text segments (e.g., markdown text or code blocks).
    AbstractTool<P,C>
    The abstract base class for a tool, now generic on its Parameter and Call types.
    AbstractToolCall<T,R>
    Represents a request to execute a specific tool.
    AbstractToolkit<T>
    Represents a collection of related tools, parsed from a single Java class.
    AbstractToolkitRenderer<T>
    A base class for specialized toolkit UIs.
    AbstractToolParameter<T>
    A rich, self-documenting, abstract representation of a single parameter for a tool method.
    AbstractToolResponse<C>
    Represents the response of a tool call, designed for deferred execution.
    AbstractViewPanel<V>
    Common base for view-specific metadata panels.
    AddDependencyResult
    Represents the detailed, multi-phase result of the Maven.addDependency "super-tool".
    AddIcon
    A programmatic "Add" icon (+) that scales and matches the current theme.
    AddProjectToContextAction
    Action to add one or more projects to the AI context.
    AdjustingTabPane
    A specialized JTabbedPane that adjusts its preferred and minimum height to match the currently selected component.
    Agi
    The central, provider-agnostic artificial super intelligence (ASI) orchestrator.
    AgiCard
    A "sticky note" style card representing an active AI session.
    AgiConfig
    The definitive configuration blueprint for an individual Agi session.
    AgiConfigPanel
    A panel for editing the framework-level configuration of an Agi session.
    AgiKart
    AgiKart is a high-performance pseudo-3D retro kart racing game in Java Swing.
    AgiKart.ItemBox
    Data object model for spawning item boxes.
    AgiKart.KartEntity
    Data object model for tracking karts.
    AgiKart.Particle
    World particle model for drift sparks and boost trails.
    AgiKart.PineTree
    Data object model for placing Pine Trees.
    AgiKart.PlacedBanana
    Data object model for banana slip obstacles.
    AgiKart.SpriteDrawable
    Functional Interface defining custom sprite-drawing instructions.
    AgiKart.SpriteProjection
    DTO containing projected coordinates and scales for drawing billboarded entities.
    AgiKart.ThrownShell
    Data object model for traveling tracking shells.
    AgiKart.TrackMushroom
    Data object model for spawning collectible mushrooms on the track.
    AgiKartIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the AgiKart game.
    AgiPanel
    The main, top-level panel for the Anahata AI Swing UI.
    AgisTableModel
    A reusable table model for displaying active AI agi sessions.
    AgiStatus
    Defines the possible operational states of the Agi, primarily for UI feedback.
    AgiTool
    Marks a method as an AI-callable tool and provides essential metadata.
    AgiToolException
    A custom runtime exception that can be thrown by AI tools to provide a concise, user-friendly error message to the model without including a stack trace.
    AgiToolkit
    Marks a class as an AI-callable toolkit and provides essential metadata.
    AgiToolParam
    Provides a description for a parameter of a method marked with AgiTool.
    AgiTopComponent
    The main TopComponent for Anahata ASI V2.
    AgiTopComponent.Resolvable
    A static inner class used for serializing the state of an AgiTopComponent.
    AgiTransferHandler
    A TransferHandler for Anahata ASI panels that automatically registers dropped files as managed V2 resources in the current agi session.
    AgiUserMessage
    A specialized UserMessage representing intent originated by another AGI session within the same ASI container.
    AiModelTableModel
    A specialized TableModel for rendering the technical specification and capabilities of AI models.
    AiProviderException
    Generic runtime exception for AiProvider implementations.
    AiProviderPanel
    A centralized, high-density configuration panel for AI Providers.
    AiProviderRegistryViewer
    A high-fidelity visual registry for exploring and selecting registered AI models.
    AiProviderRenderer
    A standard cell renderer for AbstractAiProvider objects.
    AnahataAnnotationLogic
    The decoupled logic engine for Anahata NetBeans annotations.
    AnahataAnnotationLogic.NodeType
    Semantic classification for UI node rendering.
    AnahataAnnotationProvider
    Master Shell for Anahata context visibility in NetBeans.
    AnahataClasspathProvider
    A global ClassPathProvider that intercepts queries for in-memory files and provides the appropriate classpath based on the file's context.
    AnahataContextActionPresenter
    A presenter for the dynamic "AI Context" context menu.
    AnahataDiffUtils
    Utility for generating standard unified diffs using java-diff-utils.
    AnahataInstaller
    Installer for the Anahata ASI NetBeans module.
    AnahataNodeFactory
    A factory that creates the "Anahata" virtual folder in the NetBeans Projects window.
    AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataFileChildren
    Manages the children of the Anahata folder, specifically looking for .md files.
    AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataFolderNode
    A virtual folder node named "Anahata" that serves as a container for AI-related files.
    AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataMdNode
    A specialized node for the anahata.md file that uses the Anahata icon.
    AnahataToolkit
    The base class for all AI toolkits.
    AnthropicContentAdapter
    A translation adapter that converts Anahata's unified message model into the structured JSON required by the Anthropic Messages API.
    AnthropicMessage
    Message implementation for Anthropic's Claude.
    AnthropicModel
    Model implementation for Anthropic's Claude.
    AnthropicProvider
    Provider implementation for the official Anthropic API.
    AnthropicResponse
    Response implementation for Anthropic's Claude.
    AnyChangeDocumentListener
    A utility DocumentListener that fires a single callback for any type of document change (insert or remove).
    ApiCallInterruptedException
    Exception thrown when an AI model generation call is interrupted, either by the user or by the system.
    ApiErrorRecord
    A record of a single API error, including context for retries.
    Arkanoid
    A classic Arkanoid (Breakout) clone implemented as a Swing easter egg.
    ArkanoidIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the Arkanoid game.
    AsiCardsContainerPanel
    A container panel that displays active AI agi sessions as a collection of "sticky note" cards.
    AsiCardsTopComponent
    A TopComponent that displays a list of all active Anahata ASI sessions.
    AsiContainer
    The definitive toolkit for managing and inspecting the ASI container and its active sessions.
    AsiContainerPreferences
    A unified, serializable POJO that acts as a container for all user-configured preferences.
    AsiContainerPreferencesPanel
    A centralized, multi-tabbed Command Center for managing the ASI container.
    AsiContainerPreferencesPanel.ProviderItem
    A structured representation of an available AI provider type in the system.
    AsiContainerPreferencesPanel.ProviderListCellRenderer
    A high-fidelity Swing list cell renderer designed to display rich metadata for AI providers within combo boxes and list components.
    AsiDesktopAgiConfig
    The default AgiConfig implementation for the standalone Swing application.
    AsiDesktopAsiContainer
    A specialized AbstractAsiContainer for the standalone Swing application.
    AsiDesktopMainPanel
    The main container for the Anahata AI Swing UI, managing multiple agi sessions.
    AsiExecutors
    Centralized factory for creating named, daemon thread pools used across the Anahata ASI framework.
    AsiTableContainerPanel
    A container panel that displays active AI agi sessions in a tabular format.
    AsiTableContainerPanel.ContextUsageCellRenderer
    A cell renderer for displaying context window usage as a percentage.
    AsiTableContainerPanel.StatusCellRenderer
    A cell renderer for displaying AgiStatus with appropriate colors.
    AsiTableTopComponent
    A TopComponent that displays a list of all active Anahata ASI sessions in a table.
    AtomicBooleanSerializer
    A specialized Kryo serializer for AtomicBoolean.
    AtomicIntegerSerializer
    A specialized Kryo serializer for AtomicInteger.
    AtomicLongSerializer
    A specialized Kryo serializer for AtomicLong.
    AtomsIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing Toolkits (Atoms).
    AttachIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing an "Attach" action.
    Audio
    The definitive core toolkit for audio operations.
    AudioDevice
    Represents a stable, model-agnostic descriptor for an audio device.
    AudioDevice.Type
    Enum representing the direction of the audio data.
    AudioPlaybackPanel
    A reactive panel that encapsulates audio playback functionality.
    AudioUtils
    Utility class for low-level audio signal processing.
    AutoReplyIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the auto-reply feature.
    BadTool
    A special tool implementation representing a tool that was requested by the model but was not found in the registered toolkits.
    BadToolCall
    Represents a call to a BadTool, capturing an invalid tool request from the model.
    BadToolParam
    A placeholder parameter for a BadTool.
    BadToolResponse
    The response for a BadToolCall.
    BasicContextProvider
    A basic, reusable implementation of the ContextProvider interface that provides the foundational logic for hierarchical context management.
    BasicPropertyChangeSource
    An abstract base class providing a standard implementation of PropertyChangeSource.
    BatchCodeRefiner
    The authoritative toolkit for structural Java refinement.
    BlobPart
    An abstract base class for binary data parts, such as an image or a document.
    BlobPartPanel
    Renders a BlobPart into a JComponent, handling images, audio, and file information.
    BrowserDrone
    Represents a single browser WebDriver connection and its associated state.
    BugDefense
    Anahata Bug Swarm Defense (Tactical Edition).
    BugDefenseIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the Bug Swarm Defense game.
    CancelIcon
    A programmatically drawn Cancel/X icon.
    CandidateSelectionPanel
    A specialized panel for displaying multiple response candidates side-by-side.
    CardsIcon
    A simple icon representing a grid of cards.
    Chrome
    A toolkit for web automation and form filling using Chrome and Selenium.
    ChromeUtils
    Utility class for Chrome-specific path detection and environment resolution.
    CloneIcon
    A super mega cool clone icon representing cellular mitosis or digital duplication.
    CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
    The authoritative renderer for all code block segments in the platform.
    CodeHyperlink
    A specialized JLabel that acts as a clickable hyperlink for displaying code or JSON content in a popup dialog.
    CodeModel
    Provides tools for interacting with the Java code model in NetBeans.
    CodeRefinementBatch
    A robust, agent-friendly batch of structural AST modifications for a single Java file.
    CodeRefinementBatchPolymorphic
    A container for a batch of structural Java refinement operations.
    CodeRefinementBatchRenderer
    Specialized renderer for the robust CodeRefinementBatch.
    CodeRefinementIntent
    Represents a single structural AST modification instruction in a flattened format.
    CodeRefinementIntent.Type
    Defines the types of structural modifications available for a CodeRefinementIntent.
    CodeRefinementIntentPolymorphic
    Abstract base class for all structural Java refinement intents.
    CodeRefiner
    V3.0.0 of the structural Java code refinement toolkit.
    CompressIcon
    A programmatically drawn icon representing a context compression action.
    ContextManager
    The definitive manager for an Agi session's context in the V2 architecture.
    ContextManagerNode
    The root node of the context tree, representing the ContextManager.
    ContextPanel
    A panel dedicated to displaying and managing the available AI context (history, tools, providers, and resources) using a hierarchical JXTreeTable.
    ContextPosition
    Defines the position where a ContextProvider's content should be injected into the request.
    ContextProvider
    Defines the contract for providers that inject just-in-time context into an AI request.
    ContextProviderNode
    A context tree node representing a ContextProvider.
    ContextProviderPanel
    A panel that displays the details and context previews for a ContextProvider.
    ContextTreeCellRenderer
    A custom TreeCellRenderer for the context tree that provides specific icons and labels for different types of context nodes.
    ContextTreeTableModel
    A TreeTableModel that provides a hierarchical, JNDI-style view of the entire AI context using unified AbstractContextNodes.
    ContextUsageBar
    A high-precision UI component that renders a progress bar for context window usage.
    ContextWindowGarbageCollector
    Orchestrates the monitoring and logging of the Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC).
    ContextWindowGarbageCollector.Stats
    Data object containing the categorized token metrics.
    ConversationPanel
    The main container for the conversation history, responsible for rendering a list of AbstractMessagePanel instances.
    CopyIcon
    A programmatically drawn icon representing a "Copy" action.
    CoreContextProvider
    Provides the foundational system instructions and metadata awareness for the Anahata ASI.
    CwGcPanel
    A specialized panel for monitoring the Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC) status, showing token recycling metrics and pruned content overhead with a high-fidelity donut chart and a recycling log.
    DeclaredArtifact
    Represents a declared artifact in a compact format, designed for token efficiency.
    DefaultJarHandler
    A fallback JAR handler that uses Implementation-Version manifest attributes or filename pattern matching to extract metadata.
    DefaultResourceUI
    The standard, universal implementation of ResourceUI for Standalone and generic Swing environments.
    DeleteIcon
    A programmatically drawn trash can icon for delete actions.
    DeleteMemberIntent
    Intent to delete an existing structural member.
    DependencyGroup
    A container that groups declared Maven artifacts by their common groupId.
    DependencyScope
    The top-level container that groups DependencyGroups by their Maven scope.
    DeprecatedCodeRefinementBatchRendererPolymorphic
    Deprecated.
    DiffAnnotationsLayerUI
    A highly specialized LayerUI designed to decorate NetBeans components—specifically the native Diff Viewer—with agentic annotations and boundary-aware scrolling logic.
    DiffCommentUtils
    Shared utility for calculating line numbers and mappings in agentic diff renderers.
    DiffStreamSource
    A flexible StreamSource implementation for providing string-based content to the NetBeans Diff API.
    DisabledModulesMimeUtils
    Utility class for extracting MIME type information from disabled NetBeans modules.
    DisabledModulesMimeUtils.MimeInfo
    Represents information about a MIME type found in a module.
    DoubleToolIconRefined
    A refined programmatic Swing icon for tool containers (ToolsNode).
    Editor
    Provides tools for interacting with the NetBeans editor, such as opening files, closing files, and navigating to specific lines.
    EdtPropertyChangeListener
    A smart, lifecycle-aware PropertyChangeListener that ensures UI updates occur on the Event Dispatch Thread (EDT).
    EdtPropertyChangeListener.Mode
    The execution mode for thread switching.
    ElementHandleModule
    A Jackson module that provides custom serialization and deserialization for NetBeans ElementHandle.
    ElementHandleModule.ElementHandleDeserializer
    Custom deserializer for NetBeans ElementHandle.
    ElementHandleModule.ElementHandleSerializer
    Custom serializer for NetBeans ElementHandle.
    ExceptionDialog
    A custom modal dialog for displaying exceptions with a properly formatted and indented stack trace.
    ExpandToolsPreference
    Defines the preference for the initial expansion state of tool calls in the UI.
    ExternalIcon
    A programmatic "External" icon (Box with arrow) that scales and matches the current theme.
    FilesContextActionLogic
    Logic handler for adding NetBeans files and folders to the V2 AI context.
    FinishReason
    A standardized, model-agnostic enum representing the reason why a model stopped generating content.
    Firefox
    A toolkit for web automation and form filling using Firefox and Selenium.
    FramesIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing "Frames" or "Windows".
    FullTextFileCreate
    A rich DTO for creating a new text file.
    FullTextFileCreateRenderer
    A unified, strategy-driven renderer for file creation operations.
    FullTextResourceUpdate
    A rich DTO for updating a text file with its full new content.
    FullTextResourceUpdateRenderer
    A rich renderer for FullTextResourceUpdate tool parameters.
    GarbageCollectorRecord
    A record of a single garbage collection event, capturing the recycling of a conversation turn.
    GeminiAiProvider
    The concrete implementation of the AbstractAgiProvider for the Google Gemini API.
    GeminiContentAdapter
    An object-oriented adapter that converts a single Anahata AbstractMessage into one or more native Google GenAI Content objects, injecting in-band metadata headers for improved model self-awareness.
    GeminiFunctionDeclarationAdapter
    An object-oriented adapter that converts a single Anahata AbstractTool into a native Google GenAI FunctionDeclaration.
    GeminiGoogleCloudExpressAIProvider
    The concrete implementation of the AbstractAgiProvider for the Google Gemini API.
    GeminiModel
    Gemini-specific implementation of the AbstractModel.
    GeminiModel.GeminiGenerateContentParameters
    Internal container for parameters used to invoke the Gemini API.
    GeminiModelMessage
    An object-oriented representation of a ModelMessage derived from the Gemini provider.
    GeminiPartAdapter
    An object-oriented adapter that converts a single Anahata AbstractPart into a native Google GenAI Part.
    GeminiResponse
    A specialized, object-oriented Response class for the Gemini provider.
    GeminiSchemaAdapter
    Adapts the core framework's rich JSON schema generation into the simpler, native Google GenAI Schema objects required for function declarations.
    GenerationRequest
    A simple, immutable record that encapsulates all the information required for a model to generate content: the configuration and the conversation history.
    GroundingMetadata
    Metadata about the grounding sources used by the model.
    GroundingMetadataPanel
    A specialized Swing panel for rendering GroundingMetadata in a rich, interactive format.
    GroundingSource
    Represents a single web source used for grounding, including its URI and title.
    HardcodedGeminiModel
    A specialized GeminiModel that uses hardcoded metadata instead of fetching it from the Gemini API.
    HeaderPanel
    The header panel for the agi UI, containing the agi nickname, session controls, and provider/model selection components.
    Hints
    A toolkit for managing and applying Java hints and code fixes within the NetBeans IDE.
    Hints.HintInfo
    Represents a single Java hint or code fix suggestion.
    Hints.HintMetadata
    Represents metadata for a registered Java hint type.
    History
    A specialized toolkit for managing the conversation history, including metadata injection and surgical pruning of messages and parts.
    HistoryNode
    A context tree node representing the conversation history.
    Host
    A toolkit for interacting with the host operating system and JVM.
    HostedCodeExecutionCallPart
    A specialized part representing a request from the model to execute code on the server (e.g., Python in OpenAI's Code Interpreter or Gemini's Code Execution).
    HostedCodeExecutionResultPart
    A specialized part representing the output or logs from a server-side code execution.
    HostedCodeExecutionResultPart.ModelCodeExectionOutcome
    The possible outcomes of a server-side code execution.
    HtmlRendererUtils
    Centralized utility for rendering Markdown and HTML content within the ASI Swing UI.
    HuggingFaceModel
    A model instance that carries additional metadata discovered from the Hugging Face Hub.
    HuggingFaceProvider
    A specialized provider for the Hugging Face Inference API that performs deep model inspection by fetching metadata directly from the HF Hub.
    IconProvider
    An interface for providing icons for various context-related objects.
    IconUtils
    A utility class for loading, scaling, and managing a global registry of icons.
    IDE
    Provides tools for interacting with the NetBeans IDE.
    IDE.SelectInTarget
    Defines the supported targets for programmatic selection in the IDE.
    ImageMetadataUtils
    High-performance, lightweight utilities for extracting image metadata.
    ImageMetadataUtils.ImageMetadata
    Immutable container for parsed image dimensions and metadata.
    InputPanel
    A fully functional and responsive user input component for the V2 agi.
    InputUserMessage
    A specialized UserMessage designed for direct manipulation by UI components like an input panel.
    InputUserMessagePanel
    A panel that provides a live, read-only preview of the user's input message, including markdown rendering of the text part and a display of any attached blob parts.
    InsertMemberIntent
    Intent to insert a new member (method, field, inner type) into a class or file.
    JacksonUtils
    A generic utility class for Jackson-based JSON operations.
    JarHandler
    Defines the contract for extracting metadata from JAR files during classpath inspection.
    JarMetadata
    Represents the extracted metadata of a JAR file.
    Java
    A powerful toolkit for compiling and executing Java code dynamically within the application's JVM.
    Java.SystemPropertyNode
    Represents a node in the hierarchical tree of system properties.
    JavacAlert
    Represents a single Java compiler alert (error or warning).
    JavaCodeParameterRenderer
    A specialized parameter renderer that evaluates the correct context classpath for dynamic Java execution snippets and injects it into the NetBeans viewer.
    JavadocIntent
    A structured representation of a Javadoc comment.
    JavaHierarchyNode
    A recursive DTO representing a node in the Java type hierarchy.
    JavaMember
    A lightweight, serializable "keychain" DTO that uniquely identifies a Java class member (field, method, constructor, etc.).
    JavaMemberDocs
    A rich result object that represents the outcome of a Javadoc retrieval operation for a JavaMember.
    JavaMemberPage
    A specialized Page for JavaMembers that holds a single URL representing the source/class file for all members in the page.
    JavaMemberSearch
    A "Finder" command object that searches for all members of a given JavaType upon instantiation.
    JavaMemberSource
    A rich result object that represents the outcome of a source-finding operation for a specific JavaMember.
    JavaMethodTool
    A model-agnostic, stateful representation of a single Java method tool.
    JavaMethodToolCall
    A model-agnostic representation of a request to execute a specific Java method tool.
    JavaMethodToolParameter
    A subclass of AbstractToolParameter that holds Java-specific reflection information, namely the full generic Type of the parameter.
    JavaMethodToolResponse
    A rich POJO that captures the complete and final outcome of a single tool call.
    JavaObjectToolkit
    A domain object that parses a Java class via reflection to build a complete, self-contained Toolkit, including all its tools and parameters.
    JavaPackage
    A domain object representing a logical Java package within a project.
    JavaSourceGroup
    A specialized container for a Java source group (e.g., src/main/java).
    JavaSourceUtils
    Shared utilities for NetBeans Java Source (AST) operations.
    JavaSubtypeSearch
    A "Finder" command object that recursively searches for all subtypes (implementations and subclasses) of a given JavaType.
    JavaSupertypeSearch
    A "Finder" command object that recursively searches for all supertypes (base classes and implemented interfaces) of a given JavaType.
    JavaType
    A lightweight, serializable "keychain" DTO that uniquely identifies a Java type.
    JavaTypeDocs
    A rich result object that represents the outcome of a Javadoc retrieval operation for a JavaType.
    JavaTypeSearch
    A "Finder" command object that searches for Java types upon instantiation.
    JavaTypeSource
    A rich result object that represents the outcome of a source-finding operation for a JavaType.
    KryoUtils
    A utility class for thread-safe Kryo serialization and deserialization.
    LeafIcon
    A programmatically drawn icon representing a leaf in various stages of its lifecycle.
    LeafIcon.LeafState
    Stage of the leaf's lifecycle, mapped to context pruning states.
    LineComment
    Represents a comment associated with a specific line in a text file.
    LineDeletion
    A safety-first deletion operation that removes a contiguous range of lines.
    LineInsertion
    A pure insertion operation that places new content before a specified line.
    LineReplacement
    VISUAL TARGET REPLACEMENT: Replaces a range of lines with new content.
    LinkIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing a "Link" or "URL" action.
    LoadSessionIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the "Load Session" action.
    LocalTokenizer
     
    LocalTokenizer.TextsAccumulator
     
    LocalTokenizerLoader
     
    LocalTokenizerLoader.TokenizerConfig
     
    LocalTokenizerProcessor
     
    Main
    The main entry point for the Anahata AI standalone Swing application.
    MarkupParameterRenderer
    A parameter renderer that falls back to standard markdown/HTML rendering.
    MarkupTextSegmentRenderer
    Renders a markdown text segment into a WrappingEditorPane.
    Maven
    Consolidated "super-tool" class for all Maven-related AI operations.
    MavenArtifactSearchResult
    A data transfer object representing a single search result from the Maven index.
    MavenBuildResult
    Represents the detailed result of a Maven build execution, including status, exit code, captured output, and a breakdown of build phases.
    MavenBuildResult.BuildPhase
    Represents a single phase or goal within a Maven build.
    MavenBuildResult.ProcessStatus
    The final status of the Maven process.
    MavenJarHandler
    Specialized handler for Maven-packaged JARs.
    MavenSearchResultPage
    Represents a paginated result set from a Maven index search.
    MediaRenderer
    Multimodal rendering engine for non-textual message parts.
    MediaView
    A resource view that interprets content as binary media (images, audio, etc.).
    MediaViewPanel
    A specialized metadata panel for the MediaView.
    MergeCandidate
     
    MermaidCodeBlockSegmentRenderer
    A specialized renderer for Mermaid diagrams.
    MessageNode
    A context tree node representing a single message in the conversation.
    MessagePanelFactory
    A factory for creating AbstractMessagePanel instances based on the concrete type of the AbstractMessage.
    MetabolicDonutChart
    A high-fidelity, reactive donut chart that visualizes the categorized token distribution of an AGI session's prompt.
    MicrophoneIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon that shows a studio microphone.
    MicrophonePanel
    A reactive panel that encapsulates microphone selection and recording logic.
    MimeUtils
    Utility class for working with MIME types and file extensions in NetBeans.
    MinimaxAnthropicProvider
    A provider implementation for the MiniMax API leveraging their Anthropic-compatible endpoints.
    ModalModel
    Specialized model implementation for Modal's GLM-5 endpoint.
    ModalProvider
    A pre-configured provider for Modal's GLM-5 inference endpoint.
    ModelBlobPart
    A specialized BlobPart for binary content generated by the model, including internal thought process details.
    ModelCodeExecutionCallPartPanel
    A specialized panel for rendering HostedCodeExecutionCallPart instances.
    ModelCodeExecutionResultPartPanel
    A specialized panel for rendering HostedCodeExecutionResultPart instances.
    ModelMessagePanel
    A concrete implementation of AbstractMessagePanel specifically for rendering AbstractModelMessage instances.
    ModelRenderer
    A standard cell renderer for AbstractModel objects.
    ModelSearchCallPartPanel
    A specialized panel for rendering WebSearchCallPart instances.
    ModelTextPart
    A specialized TextPart for content generated by an AI model.
    MoveMemberIntent
    Intent to move an existing member to a new position.
    NbHandle
    A NetBeans-native resource handle that wraps a FileObject.
    NbHandlePanel
    A specialized metadata panel for the NbHandle.
    NbJava
    A NetBeans-aware extension of the core Java toolkit.
    NbResourceUI
    NetBeans-specific implementation of ResourceUI.
    NetBeansAgiConfig
    NetBeans-specific agi configuration.
    NetBeansAsiContainer
    NetBeans-specific configuration for the Anahata ASI.
    NetBeansIconProvider
    A NetBeans-specific implementation of IconProvider that fetches authentic, annotated IDE icons for projects and files.
    NetBeansJarHandler
    Specialized JAR handler for parsing NetBeans Platform module manifests and metadata.
    NetBeansModuleUtils
    Utility class for introspecting NetBeans modules and their classpaths.
    NetBeansOutput
    Static utility for interacting with the NetBeans Output Window and its tabs.
    NetBeansTextResourceViewer
    A NetBeans-native text resource viewer that provides 100% IDE fidelity.
    NetBeansTopComponents
    Static utility for gathering information about open TopComponents (windows) in NetBeans.
    NextIcon
    A programmatically drawn Next (right arrow/chevron) icon.
    ObjectSummarizer
    Utility class designed to generate concise, human-readable summaries and truncations of complex Java objects, collections, maps, and strings.
    ObjectToStringParameterRenderer
    A specialized parameter renderer that converts any Java object to a string and displays it using a high-fidelity IDE viewer.
    OkIcon
    A programmatically drawn OK/Checkmark icon.
    OnTheFlyAgiTool
    The base class for all Java code generated by the AI model.
    OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
    A universal AI provider for any API endpoint compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completion specification.
    OpenAiCompatibleHostedTool
    Enumeration of native server-side tools provided by OpenAI via the Responses API.
    OpenAiCompatibleMessage
    Implementation of OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage for the standard Chat Completions API.
    OpenAiCompatibleModel
    A concrete implementation of AbstractModel that communicates with any OpenAI-compatible Chat Completion API using the standard JDK HttpClient.
    OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
    Base implementation for OpenAI-specific model messages.
    OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle
    Defines the strategy for extracting reasoning/thought content from an OpenAI-compatible response.
    OpenAiCompatibleResponse
    Encapsulates the complete response from an OpenAI-compatible API.
    OpenAiCompatibleResponseAdapter
    A specialized content adapter that translates Anahata's domain model into standard OpenAI-compatible JSON objects for the Chat Completion API.
    OpenAiItemAdapter
    Pure content adapter for the OpenAI Responses API, strictly translating Anahata's domain model into the "Items" architecture.
    OpenAiModel
    Native implementation for OpenAI models using the Responses API (/v1/responses).
    OpenAiModel.PreparedPayload
    Record holding the three distinct partitions of a request payload.
    OpenAiModelMessage
    Specialized ModelMessage for the OpenAI Responses API.
    OpenAiResponse
    Specialized Response implementation for the OpenAI Responses API.
    OpenAiResponsesProvider
    Clean-room provider for OpenAI, strictly utilizing the modern Responses API (/v1/responses).
    OpenTopComponentsContextProvider
    Provides a real-time Markdown table of all open TopComponents (windows) in the IDE.
    OptionalSerializer
    A custom Kryo serializer for Optional.
    OutputTabInfo
    Represents a logical snapshot of a tab in the NetBeans Output Window.
    OutputTabsContextProvider
    Provides a list of all open tabs in the NetBeans Output Window, including a tail of the content for each tab.
    Page<T>
    A generic, self-contained container for a paginated result set.
    ParameterRenderer<T>
    A generic interface for rendering tool parameters.
    ParameterRendererFactory
    A factory for creating specialized ParameterRenderer instances.
    PartNode
    A context tree node representing a single part of a message.
    PartPanelFactory
    A factory for creating AbstractPartPanel instances based on the concrete type of the AbstractPart.
    PathHandle
    A filesystem-backed resource handle for physical local files.
    PathHandlePanel
    A specialized metadata panel for the PathHandle.
    PathParameterRenderer
    A specialized parameter renderer for absolute file paths.
    PathSerializer
    A Kryo serializer for Path objects.
    PinnedIcon
    A programmatically drawn pushpin icon to represent a "pinned" state.
    PrevIcon
    A programmatically drawn Previous (left arrow/chevron) icon.
    PrismIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the V2 Resources (Prism).
    ProjectAlert
    Represents a high-level project problem (e.g., missing dependency).
    ProjectAlertsContextProvider
    Provides real-time diagnostics for a project, including Java compiler errors and high-level project problems.
    ProjectComponent
    A leaf or branch node representing a physical file or a logical Java type.
    ProjectContextProvider
    A hierarchical context provider for a specific NetBeans project.
    ProjectDiagnostics
    A container for all diagnostics found during a project scan.
    ProjectFile
    Represents a single file within a project, including its metadata and status.
    ProjectFiles
    Represents the file and folder structure of a NetBeans project.
    ProjectFilesContextProvider
    Provides a real-time view of a project's file and folder structure.
    ProjectNode
    The abstract base class for all structural nodes in the project model.
    ProjectOverview
    Represents a high-level, structured overview of a NetBeans project.
    Projects
    A toolkit for interacting with the NetBeans Project APIs.
    ProjectsContextActionLogic
    Stateless utility class containing the core logic for managing NetBeans Projects within an AI agi context.
    ProjectStructure
    The high-level orchestrator for the refined project structure model.
    ProjectStructureContextProvider
    Provides a unified, architecturally-aware view of a project's structure.
    PropertyChangeSource
    A standard interface for objects that provide PropertyChangeSupport.
    PruningState
    Defines the possible pruning and pinning states for messages and parts within the conversation context.
    PulseIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing History (Pulse).
    Radio
    A stateful toolkit for playing internet radio streams.
    Radio.BridgedJavaSoundAudioDevice
    A specialized JLayer-to-JavaSound bridge that routes streams to a specific AudioDevice.
    RadioRenderer
    A specialized UI for the Radio toolkit.
    RagMessage
    A specialized UserMessage that represents just-in-time, ephemeral context provided by the environment (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).
    RagMessagePanel
    A specialized message panel for rendering messages in non-history UI components.
    RagMessageViewer
    A specialized scroll pane for rendering any AbstractMessage.
    Rebindable
    An interface for objects that require re-initialization after being deserialized (e.g., to restore transient fields like listeners or locks).
    RebindableSerializerFactory
    A custom SerializerFactory that automatically wraps all created serializers with a RebindableWrapperSerializer.
    RebindableWrapperSerializer<T>
    A decorator serializer that adds automated Rebindable support to any existing Kryo serializer.
    RecordingIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon that indicates active recording.
    Refactor
    A toolkit for performing programmatic refactoring operations within the NetBeans IDE.
    Refactor.ParameterChange
    DTO for specifying changes to method parameters.
    RefreshPolicy
    Defines the refresh policy for a Resource when its content is provided to the model via the Augmented Workspace.
    RegionSelectionIcon
    A specialized icon representing a rectangular region selection with a mouse pointer.
    RelativePosition
    Defines positions for structural member insertion.
    RemoveProjectFromContextAction
    Action to remove one or more projects from the AI context.
    RequestConfig
    The definitive, model-agnostic configuration object for a single API request.
    RequestConfigAdapter
    A focused adapter responsible for converting our model-agnostic RequestConfig into a Google GenAI GenerateContentConfig.
    RequestConfigPanel
    A panel for editing the model-specific execution configuration (RequestConfig).
    ResolvedDependencyGroup
    A container that groups fully resolved artifacts by their common groupId.
    ResolvedDependencyScope
    The top-level container for resolved dependencies, grouping them by Maven scope.
    Resource
    The Universal Resource Orchestrator.
    ResourceFolder
    A domain object representing a physical directory containing project resources.
    ResourceHandle
    A strategy interface for physical or virtual connectivity to resource data.
    ResourceManager
    The next-generation V2 Resource Manager.
    ResourceNode
    A context tree node representing a single V2 managed resource.
    ResourcePanel
    A specialized panel for managing and viewing a V2 Resource.
    Resources
    The definitive V2 URI-centric toolkit for managed multimodal resources.
    ResourcesNode
    A context tree node representing the V2 Resource Manager.
    ResourceSourceGroup
    A specialized container for a physical resource source group (e.g., src/main/resources).
    ResourceUI
    The definitive strategy interface for providing a host-aware user interface for V2 Resources.
    ResourceUiRegistry
    A singleton registry that holds the active ResourceUI strategy for the host environment.
    ResourceUUIDParameterRenderer
    A specialized parameter renderer for Resource UUIDs.
    ResourceView
    The perspective through which a resource is viewed by the model.
    Response<T>
    A standardized, model-agnostic response received from an AI model provider.
    ResponseUsageMetadata
    Metadata about the token usage for a single API response.
    RestartIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing a restart or clear action.
    RetryableApiException
    A specialized exception indicating that an API call failed but is potentially retryable.
    Role
    Defines the role of the entity that created a message, providing a type-safe way to distinguish between user, model, and tool messages.
    RSyntaxTextAreaTextResourceViewer
    A specialized viewer for textual resources using RSyntaxTextArea.
    RunAndSendIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing a "Run All and Send" action.
    RunIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing a single "Run" action.
    SaveIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the "Save Session" action.
    SchemaProvider
    A clean, focused provider for generating OpenAPI/Swagger compliant JSON schemas from Java types.
    Screens
    A hardware-aware toolkit for capturing high-fidelity screenshots of the host system's displays and individual application windows.
    Screens.SharedRegion
    Represents a shared rectangular region of the screen.
    ScreenShareIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing screen sharing status.
    ScreenshotIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing a "Screenshot" action.
    ScrollablePanel
    A flexible JPanel that implements the Scrollable interface, allowing for configurable scrolling behavior.
    SearchIcon
    A programmatically drawn search (magnifying glass) icon using the full Barça palette.
    SeleniumJarHandler
    Specialized handler for Selenium libraries.
    SendIcon
    A programmatically drawn Send icon (Paper Plane).
    ServerTool
    Represents a server-side tool provided by an AI model (e.g., Google Search, Code Execution).
    ServerToolsIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing server-side tool execution.
    Session
    The definitive toolkit for managing the current agi session's metadata, tool capabilities, and context pruning policies.
    SessionConfigPanel
    A tabbed aggregator panel for editing both the framework-level (AgiConfig) and model-specific (RequestConfig) settings of an AI session.
    SettingsIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the local tool execution feature (Functions).
    SharedScreenEditorFrame
    A control panel for managing live screen sharing and region selection.
    SharedScreenEditorFrame.SelectionPanel
    Overlay panel for interactive screen region selection.
    Shell
    A tool provider that allows the AI model to execute commands in the local shell.
    Shell.ShellType
    Defines the supported shell types.
    ShellExecutionResult
    Encapsulates the result of a shell command execution.
    ShowAsiClasspathAction
    Action to display the Anahata ASI V2 classpath in a NetBeans output tab.
    SliderSpinner
    A combined component featuring a JSpinner and a JSlider that stay in sync.
    SmallTestClass
    Base Test Class for AST.
    SmallTestClass.GenericInner<X,Y>
     
    SmallTestClass.InnerTest
    Inner Class Doc.
    SmallTestClass.TestEnum
    A test enum.
    SmallTestClass.TestEnum2
     
    Snake
    A classic Snake game implementation with a Mapacho theme.
    SnakeIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the Snake game.
    SourceFolder
    Represents a folder within a source directory tree, containing files and subfolders.
    Speech
    A toolkit for speech synthesis (TTS) and audio alerts.
    StatusManager
    Manages and broadcasts the real-time operational status of an Agi session.
    StatusPanel
    The primary dashboard for real-time monitoring of an AGI session's health and state.
    StatusPanel.StatusIndicator
    A simple component that paints a colored circle to indicate status.
    StopIcon
    A programmatically drawn stop icon (square).
    StreamObserver<R>
    A simple interface for observing a stream of values, typically used for asynchronous token streaming from an AI model.
    StringHandle
    A memory-backed resource handle for virtual or proposed content.
    StringHandlePanel
    A specialized metadata panel for the StringHandle.
    SupportPanel
    A high-salience UI component providing support links and community resources.
    SurgicalEditComparator
    The definitive comparator for surgical line edits, ensuring coordinate stability and predictable tie-breaking.
    SwingAgiConfig
    A concrete AgiConfig for standalone Swing applications, providing UI-specific settings like themes and colors.
    SwingAgiConfig.UITheme
    A collection of color and font definitions that define the visual identity of the Anahata Swing UI.
    SwingAgiTool
    The foundational base class for all Swing-based agentic tools.
    SwingJava
    An extension of the Java toolkit that provides Swing-specific execution utilities, such as EDT synchronization with context propagation.
    SwingTask<T>
    A robust, high-performance background task execution unit for the Anahata ASI.
    SwingTaskManager
    A centralized registry for tracking active SwingTask instances.
    SwingTaskMonitor
    A self-contained monitor component for tracking active background tasks.
    SwingToolContext
    An advanced execution context that bridges the gap between background tool execution and the Swing Event Dispatch Thread (EDT).
    SwingUtils
    A collection of general-purpose Swing utility methods, primarily for image manipulation and UI component creation.
    Symbol
     
    TableIcon
    A simple programmatic icon representing a data table.
    TaskStatusComponent
    A high-density status bar component for monitoring background activities.
    TeeInputOutput
    A decorator for the NetBeans InputOutput system that captures output and error streams into internal buffers while delegating to the original implementation.
    TeeInputOutput.TeeOutputWriter
    A specialized OutputWriter that writes to two different Writer instances simultaneously.
    Tetris
    Anahata Atoms Tetris - A high-fidelity implementation of the classic puzzle game.
    Tetris.Shape
    Represents the layout and operations of a single Tetris block geometry.
    Tetris.Tetrominoes
    Enumeration of all standard tetromino geometry variations.
    TetrisIcon
    A programmatically drawn Icon representing the Tetris game.
    TextPart
    An abstract base class for text-based message parts.
    TextPartPanel
    Renders a TextPart into a list of JComponents, handling markdown and code block rendering.
    TextReplacement
    Represents a single text replacement operation within a file.
    TextResourceLineEdits
    The next-generation surgical line editor for AGI.
    TextResourceLineEditsRenderer
    A rich renderer for the next-generation TextResourceLineEdits tool parameters.
    TextResourceReplacements
    Represents a set of text replacement operations for a specific file.
    TextResourceReplacementsRenderer
    A rich renderer for TextResourceReplacements tool parameters.
    TextSegmentDescriptor
    A record that describes a segment of text within a TextPartPanel.
    TextSegmentType
    Defines the type of a text segment within a AbstractTextSegmentRenderer.
    TextUtils
    A collection of general-purpose text and formatting utility methods.
    TextView
    A resource view that interprets content as plain text.
    TextViewPanel
    A specialized metadata panel for the TextView.
    TextViewport
    The V2 Universal Streaming Viewport Engine.
    TextViewportSettings
    Encapsulates adjustable viewport configuration for V2 text resources.
    ThinkingLevel
    Standardized, model-agnostic enum representing the level of "thinking" or reasoning tokens that the model should generate.
    ThoughtSignature
    An interface for model-generated parts that can carry a thought signature.
    TikaUtils
    Utility class wrapping the Apache Tika parser engine for robust file MIME type detection and plain text extraction from various binary formats.
    TimeUtils
    Utility class for time-related formatting.
    Token
     
    TokenizerType
    Defines the supported tokenizer strategies for the Anahata ASI.
    TokenizerUtils
    A centralized utility class for token counting, powered by the jtokkit library.
    ToolbarPanel
    The vertical toolbar panel for the agi UI, containing primary action toggles.
    ToolCallPanel
    A specialized panel for rendering an AbstractToolCall and its associated AbstractToolResponse within a model message.
    ToolContext
    The base class for Java code generated by the AI model or for toolkit implementations.
    ToolContext.CapturedToolContext
    A thread-safe, immutable snapshot of a tool's execution context.
    ToolExecutionStatus
    Represents the lifecycle status of a single tool's execution.
    ToolExecutionStatusRenderer
    A specialized renderer for ToolExecutionStatus enums in JComboBoxes.
    ToolIcon
    A programmatic Swing icon for tools, representing an executable function.
    ToolkitNode
    A context tree node representing an AbstractToolkit.
    ToolkitPanel
    A panel that displays the details and management controls for an AbstractToolkit.
    ToolkitPermissionsPanel
    A dedicated panel for managing tool permissions at the container level.
    ToolkitPermissionsPanel.PermissionsTreeTableModel
    TreeTableModel implementation for the hierarchical tool permissions view.
    ToolkitPermissionsPanel.PermissionsTreeTableModel.ToolkitNode
    Represents a Toolkit grouping in the tree.
    ToolkitPermissionsPanel.PermissionsTreeTableModel.ToolNode
    Represents an individual Tool in the tree.
    ToolkitRenderer<T>
    The fundamental contract for any component capable of rendering an AnahataToolkit in a Swing environment.
    ToolkitUiRegistry
    A singleton registry for mapping toolkit classes to their specialized UI renderer classes.
    ToolManager
    Manages the lifecycle of all AI tools, including registration, configuration, and lookup.
    ToolManagerNode
    A specialized context tree node representing the ToolManager.
    ToolNode
    A context tree node representing an AbstractTool.
    ToolPanel
    A panel that displays the details and controls for a specific AbstractTool.
    ToolPermission
    Represents the user's interactive, one-time choice for a specific tool invocation within the UI prompt.
    ToolPermissionRenderer
    A specialized renderer for ToolPermission enums in JComboBoxes.
    ToolResponseAttachment
    Represents a binary attachment associated with a tool's response.
    ToolResponseAttachmentsPanel
    A panel for rendering a list of ToolResponseAttachments.
    ToolsNode
    A context tree node that acts as a container for all tools within a toolkit.
    TopComponentInfo
    Represents detailed metadata about an open TopComponent (window) in the IDE.
    Trie
     
    TrieNode
     
    UICapture
    A native-aware utility for capturing visual snapshots of the host's desktop environment and individual Swing frames.
    UpdateMemberIntent
    Intent to update an existing structural member.
    UriParameterRenderer
    A specialized parameter renderer for URIs.
    UrlHandle
    A resource handle that points to a remote URL or a protocol-based entry.
    UrlHandle.Metadata
    Record for holding captured metadata.
    UrlHandlePanel
    A specialized metadata panel for the UrlHandle.
    UserBlobPart
    A concrete BlobPart implementation for binary content provided by the user.
    UserMessage
    Represents a conversation message originating from the end-user.
    UserMessagePanel
    A concrete implementation of AbstractMessagePanel specifically for rendering UserMessage instances in the conversation history.
    UserTextPart
    A concrete TextPart implementation for text content provided by the user.
    VeryPrettyClassPathPrinter
    A token-efficient classpath printer that encapsulates both raw and pretty versions.
    VeryPrettyClassPathPrinter.DirectoryNode
     
    WebSearchCallPart
    A specialized part representing a search query or search intent generated by the model.
    WrapLayout
    A modified version of FlowLayout that allows components to wrap to the next line.
    WrappingEditorPane
    A JEditorPane subclass that implements the Scrollable interface to ensure correct line wrapping and horizontal scrolling behavior when placed inside a JScrollPane.

    Support the aliens ❤️
    Força Barça!
